title: 面临算力挑战，Moonshot AI暂停C端新用户订阅；
description: Moonshot AI的Kimi今天发布公告称，为保证现有订阅用户的体验，决定立即暂停C端新用户订阅，将所有可用算力用于服务现有订阅者，并确保其所有权益不受影响。
titleZh: 面临算力挑战，Moonshot AI暂停C端新用户订阅；
titleEn: Facing Computing Power Challenges, Moonshot AI Suspends New User Subscriptions for C-End; Apple Offline Stores Test Recording Customer Conversations; China's Auto Exports Surge 54% in First Half of the Year | Geek's Daily
descriptionZh: Moonshot AI的Kimi今天发布公告称，为保证现有订阅用户的体验，决定立即暂停C端新用户订阅，将所有可用算力用于服务现有订阅者，并确保其所有权益不受影响。
descriptionEn: Moonshot AI's Kimi today issued an announcement stating that to ensure the experience of existing subscribed users, it has decided to suspend new user subscriptions for the C-end effective immediately, allocating all available computing power to serve existing subscribers and ensuring that all their rights and interests remain unaffected.

descriptionEn: Companies that are built on AI from the beginning operate leaner and flatter than early-stage startups.

title: 7岁就开公司？
description: 对于孩子们来说，人工智能只是一个有趣的科技工具，可以聊天、做事，但在父母眼中，人工智能是他们中年焦虑的持剑者，是孩子们必须抓住的“天堂之梯”——即使攀登这个梯子可能要付出惨痛的代价。
titleZh: 7岁就开公司？
titleEn: Starting a company at 7? Making a movie at 9? Post-90s parents are raising "AI prodigies"
descriptionZh: 对于孩子们来说，人工智能只是一个有趣的科技工具，可以聊天、做事，但在父母眼中，人工智能是他们中年焦虑的持剑者，是孩子们必须抓住的“天堂之梯”——即使攀登这个梯子可能要付出惨痛的代价。
descriptionEn: For children, AI is just a fun tech tool that can chat and get things done, but in the eyes of parents, AI is the sword-bearer of their midlife anxiety and the "ladder to heaven" their children must grasp—even if climbing that ladder may come at a terrible cost.

title: 坎纳/WrenAI
description: 面向AI智能体的GenBI（生成式商业智能），一个开源的、受管控的文本转SQL工具，通过开放的上下文层将自然语言问题转化为可信的仪表盘、图表和SQL查询，支持超过20种数据源，如BigQuery、Snowflake、PostgreSQL、ClickHouse、Amazon Redshift、Databricks等。 | 点赞：16,033 分支：1,832
titleZh: 坎纳/WrenAI
titleEn: Canner / WrenAI
descriptionZh: 面向AI智能体的GenBI（生成式商业智能），一个开源的、受管控的文本转SQL工具，通过开放的上下文层将自然语言问题转化为可信的仪表盘、图表和SQL查询，支持超过20种数据源，如BigQuery、Snowflake、PostgreSQL、ClickHouse、Amazon Redshift、Databricks等。 | 点赞：16,033 分支：1,832
descriptionEn: GenBI (Generative Business Intelligence) for AI agents is an open source, controlled text-to-SQL tool that converts natural language questions into trusted dashboards, charts, and SQL queries through an open context layer. It supports more than 20 data sources, such as BigQuery, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Amazon Redshift, Databricks, etc.
